noise_envelopes.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_nanograv invocation=tool/nanograv_pulsar_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)

intake.summary: Redesign the v-metric (verification metric) used to gate Tier-1 promotion in kick(ω-cycle) witnesses. Current de-facto v-metric is `falsifier_pass_count` — an unweighted count of PASS verdicts. This treats all falsifiers as equal, conflates trivial vs adversarial passes, has no first-class slot for ACKNOWLEDGED, and is not commensurable across cycles with different falsifier counts.

current_de_facto_v_metric.computation: len([f for f in falsifier_outcomes if f.verdict == 'PASS'])
current_de_facto_v_metric.gate_rule: tier_1_gate_overall = PASS iff falsifier_pass_count >= K (K ≈ majority of pre_registered_falsifiers, often K=3 of 4 or 4 of 5)
current_de_facto_v_metric.ACKNOWLEDGED_handling: per #17 MT2 spec: ACKNOWLEDGED counts toward gate as if PASS, but evidence varies by author; not all witnesses follow this
current_de_facto_v_metric.evidence: #34 reports tier_1_count aggregate=99 across 49 witnesses (avg ≈ 2.0/cycle) computed by simple count; #20 verdict-cluster has 'decision'+'tier_gate' field-name variants showing the count itself is a canonical concept but its inputs are heterogeneous

problem_statement: P1 commensurability: a 6/6-PASS cycle and a 3/3-PASS cycle both yield falsifier_pass_count=3..6 with no ratio normalization; cross-cycle comparison is fragile
P2 weight-uniformity: scope-boundary falsifiers (cheap to PASS by construction) count equally with adversarial coverage falsifiers (designed to fail) — the metric rewards padding

P3 ACKNOWLEDGED ambiguity: post-#17 MT2, ACKNOWLEDGED is canonical but its arithmetic position is informal — sometimes counted, sometimes excluded; #20 audit found 0 cycles with explicit verdict-enum field

P4 difficulty-blindness: a falsifier that pre-registered an obvious truism (e.g. 'JSON parses') and one that pre-registered a stress test (e.g. 'rotates 90° symmetric under input perm') count identically
P5 coverage-blindness: a 3-falsifier cycle covering only design-validity and a 3-falsifier cycle covering {design, evidence, scope, adversarial, meta} yield equivalent v-metric values
P6 self-anchored vs externally-graded: current v-metric is fully self-graded — author writes both the falsifier and the verdict; no orthogonal grader axis
intake.design_method: Pre-register 5 falsifiers covering design-strategy completeness, falsifier-coverage taxonomy, commensurability, irreducible-friction acknowledgment, federation compatibility. Fan out 3 orthogonal axes: (A) design-strategy options enumeration; (B) falsifier-coverage taxonomy; (C) backward-compatibility / federation. Recommend a v-metric formula with explicit weights, range [0,1], and a coverage component. Forecast adoption with skepticism band.

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: design-strategy-options-enumerated-with-tradeoffs
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: ≥3 distinct redesign options enumerated, each with explicit (a) computation formula, (b) backward-compatibility cost, (c) failure mode under adversarial author
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: 4 options enumerated below: O1 ratio-only, O2 weighted-class-sum, O3 coverage-and-strength composite, O4 dual-channel (kept-self-grade + external-replay-grade); each has formula, BC cost, and adversarial failure mode.

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: falsifier-coverage-taxonomy-defined-with-class-count-≥4
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: a taxonomy of ≥4 falsifier classes is defined with EXAMPLES from existing witnesses; coverage-component of v-metric depends on it; class boundaries are non-overlapping or explicitly marked overlapping
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: 5-class taxonomy below: C1 design-validity, C2 evidence-grounding, C3 scope-boundary, C4 adversarial-stress, C5 meta-honesty. Each class has 2+ example falsifier ids from prior cycles. Class boundaries marked: C3 and C5 can overlap when scope-boundary IS the meta-honesty claim (e.g. F5 in #33).

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: commensurability-and-range-explicit
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: the recommended v-metric has explicit range [0,1] (or stated alternative); cross-cycle comparison rule is stated; comparison fragility footnotes are listed honestly
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: Recommended formula V = 0.6 * S + 0.4 * C where S=strength (weighted PASS rate over PASS+FAIL only) ∈ [0,1] and C=coverage (number of distinct falsifier-classes covered / 5) ∈ [0,1], so V ∈ [0,1]. ACKNOWLEDGED contributes to coverage but not to strength denominator (per F4 ACKNOWLEDGED-handling rule). Comparison rule: V₁ > V₂ is meaningful only when both cycles share a comparable kind (design vs build vs measurement); cross-kind ranking has no claim.

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: irreducible-friction-acknowledged-honest
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: at least 1 source of irreducible-difficulty in v-metric design is acknowledged with verdict ACKNOWLEDGED rather than papered over; explicit anti-temptation list is included
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: Three irreducible-friction acknowledgments: (a) self-grading is structural to kick(ω-cycle) — author writes falsifier AND verdict, so v-metric remains self-anchored unless dual_channel external-replay grader (O4) is funded; (b) cross-cycle ranking by V is fragile because falsifier difficulty calibration is per-author and per-domain; (c) coverage-class taxonomy will drift as new cycle kinds emerge — any fixed denominator (here: /5) becomes stale. ACKNOWLEDGED rather than PASS because these are meta-honesty claims about METRIC LIMITS, not falsifiable propositions about the design itself.

pre_registered_falsifiers.name: federation-and-backward-compat-explicit
pre_registered_falsifiers.criterion: redesign defines (a) how legacy falsifier_pass_count + tier_1_count fields coexist with v-metric (kept / deprecated / aliased); (b) lint federation contract per #33 I2 witness_schema_lint; (c) migration path with grace period
pre_registered_falsifiers.evidence: Migration spec below: keep legacy fields verbatim (no retroactive edit); add new top-level field `v_metric` { value, version, components{ S, C, n_pass, n_fail, n_ack, classes_covered, weights }, computation_sentinel } as OPTIONAL initially; tool/witness_schema_lint.hexa rule_id 'v-metric-presence' INFO-level for 7d, then WARN at 14d, never ERROR (because legacy witnesses are immutable). Federation: shared raw 80 sentinel format __V_METRIC_SCORE__ V=<f> S=<f> C=<f> classes=<L>; sibling to existing __WITNESS_SCHEMA_LINT__ etc.

falsifier_outcomes.evidence: 3 irreducible-difficulty acknowledgments documented; per #17 MT2, ACKNOWLEDGED is canonical for meta-honesty falsifiers about metric limits

fanout_axes.name: design-strategy
fanout_axes.method: enumerate redesign options across the spectrum {minimal-fix, taxonomy-weighted, composite-with-coverage, dual-channel-external-grade}; score each by (BC cost, adversarial robustness, computability)
fanout_axes.result: 4 options O1..O4 spec'd; recommend O3 composite-with-coverage as primary, hold O4 dual-channel as future-work conditional on grader-budget

fanout_axes.name: falsifier-coverage
fanout_axes.method: extract observed falsifier types from #29/#34 witness corpus + #17 codified patterns; cluster into non-redundant classes; pick denominator size that is stable but not too coarse
fanout_axes.result: 5-class taxonomy {design-validity, evidence-grounding, scope-boundary, adversarial-stress, meta-honesty}; choice of K=5 traded against K=3 (too coarse) and K=8 (drifts)

fanout_axes.name: backward-compat-federation
fanout_axes.method: specify legacy-field policy + lint integration with #33 I2 witness_schema_lint + sentinel raw 80 format + migration grace; ensure no retroactive edits to landed witnesses
fanout_axes.result: additive-only schema change; v_metric is optional new field; lint level INFO→WARN over 14d; legacy fields preserved verbatim; sentinel __V_METRIC_SCORE__ added to federation

axes_correlation_estimate: ≈ 0.30 (design-strategy is normative about FORMULA SHAPE; falsifier-coverage is descriptive about TAXONOMY; backward-compat is operational about MIGRATION — three different methods, expected correlation < 0.7 per raw 48)

tier_1_gate.honesty_federation_F4_F5: PASS (F4 ACKNOWLEDGED counts toward gate per #17 MT2)

redesign_options_table.name: ratio-only
redesign_options_table.formula: V = n_pass / (n_pass + n_fail)  (ACKNOWLEDGED excluded from both)
redesign_options_table.bc_cost: LOW — pure derived field, legacy count remains canonical
redesign_options_table.adversarial_failure: author can pad with cheap PASS falsifiers to inflate ratio without changing absolute count; does not address P2/P4/P5
redesign_options_table.verdict: rejected as primary — addresses P1 only

redesign_options_table.name: class-weighted-sum
redesign_options_table.formula: V = Σ(w_class · 1[verdict=PASS]) / Σ(w_class · 1[verdict ∈ {PASS,FAIL}]); weights: w_design=1.0, w_evidence=1.5, w_adversarial=2.0, w_scope=0.5, w_meta=1.0
redesign_options_table.bc_cost: MEDIUM — requires per-falsifier `class` field; legacy witnesses lack it; can default-class='unknown' with weight 1.0
redesign_options_table.adversarial_failure: author picks own class label; class-inflation by mislabeling cheap as adversarial
redesign_options_table.verdict: useful component but insufficient alone — does not address P5 coverage

redesign_options_table.name: composite-strength-and-coverage
redesign_options_table.formula: V = α·S + (1-α)·C, where S = O2 (class-weighted strength) and C = |{classes with at least 1 PASS or ACKNOWLEDGED}| / 5; recommend α=0.6
redesign_options_table.bc_cost: MEDIUM — same per-falsifier class field as O2; coverage is derived
redesign_options_table.adversarial_failure: padding by adding 1 falsifier per class can raise C cheaply; mitigated by w_class weighting in S; padding still bounded by α=0.6 strength contribution
redesign_options_table.verdict: RECOMMENDED PRIMARY — addresses P1, P2, P4, P5 partially; P3 handled by ACKNOWLEDGED contributing to C but not S denominator; P6 deferred to O4

redesign_options_table.name: dual-channel-self-plus-external-replay
redesign_options_table.formula: V_self = O3 self-graded; V_replay = O3 re-evaluated by an independent agent reading only witness + carry-forward inputs; report both, plus delta = |V_self - V_replay|
redesign_options_table.bc_cost: HIGH — requires replay-grader infrastructure; per-cycle compute cost ≈ 1 sub-agent invocation
redesign_options_table.adversarial_failure: if replay grader is the same model as author, partial collusion possible; mitigated by different prompt + different temperature seed
redesign_options_table.verdict: DEFERRED — high-leverage for P6 but not justified at current cycle volume; revisit at carry-forward[3]

C1_design_validity.definition: claims about the DESIGN as written: completeness, internal consistency, option enumeration
examples: #33 F1 friction-source-per-pattern-identified; #34 F2 axis extraction reflects two honest views; THIS F1

C2_evidence_grounding.definition: claims that cited evidence actually supports the assertion (citations resolve, numbers match, not speculative)
examples: #33 F2 1-intervention-per-source-spec'd with sentinel+LOC; #34 F4 Shannon entropy computed correctly

C3_scope_boundary.definition: claims that explicitly mark out-of-scope and refuse to overclaim; often the cheapest class to PASS
examples: #33 F3 federation-coordination-explicit (scope = federation contract); raw_8 compliance fields

C4_adversarial_stress.definition: claims that DELIBERATELY try to break the design; stress tests, edge cases, attacker model
examples: O3 adversarial_failure analysis above; #33 F4 adoption-forecast-evidence-based-not-spin

C5_meta_honesty.definition: claims about the LIMITS of the cycle's own claims; usually verdict ACKNOWLEDGED; F5 in #33 and F4 here
C5_meta_honesty.overlap_note: C5 may overlap C3 when scope-boundary IS the meta-claim; mark with class=['C3','C5'] (multi-class allowed)

S_strength.domain: denominator excludes ACKNOWLEDGED (per F4 acknowledgment); domain restricted to falsifiable verdicts only
S_strength.edge_case: if denominator == 0 (all ACKNOWLEDGED, no PASS/FAIL), define S = 1.0 with WARNING flag s_undefined=true

C_coverage.domain: ACKNOWLEDGED contributes (a meta-honesty falsifier is real coverage)
C_coverage.edge_case: if a falsifier is multi-class, count each class once in numerator

v_metric_v1_spec.alpha_choice: α=0.6 — strength weighted higher than coverage because coverage is cheap to pad (1 falsifier per class clears C=1.0); strength still dominates

verdict_handling.PASS: contributes weighted to S numerator and denominator; contributes to C class set
verdict_handling.FAIL: contributes weighted to S denominator only; does NOT contribute to C class set
verdict_handling.ACKNOWLEDGED: does NOT contribute to S; contributes to C class set (honest meta-claim is real coverage)

v_metric_v1_spec.per_falsifier_field_added: pre_registered_falsifiers[i].class (string OR list[string]; values from {C1_design_validity, C2_evidence_grounding, C3_scope_boundary, C4_adversarial_stress, C5_meta_honesty}; default 'C1_design_validity' if absent for legacy parse)
v_metric_v1_spec.comparison_rule: V₁ ≷ V₂ is meaningful ONLY when (a) both cycles share kind (design vs build vs measurement); (b) both cycles published v_metric.version ≥ v1; (c) class taxonomy not changed between them. Cross-version comparison forbidden without re-grade.
v_metric_v1_spec.tier_1_gate_relation: tier_1_gate.tier_1_gate_overall = PASS iff V ≥ 0.5 AND legacy gate (n_pass ≥ K) ALSO holds; AND-of-both is conservative and does not retroactively invalidate any landed witness.

backward_compatibility_and_migration.legacy_field_status: RETAINED VERBATIM forever; no retroactive edit to landed witnesses (raw 8 immutability + atlas append-only)
backward_compatibility_and_migration.new_field_status: v_metric is OPTIONAL on all new witnesses for 7 days; OPTIONAL+INFO-lint for days 7..14; OPTIONAL+WARN-lint for days 14..28; never ERROR (legacy witnesses cannot be coerced)

lint_integration.behavior_phase_1: INFO-level reminder for missing v_metric on new witnesses (days 0..7)
lint_integration.behavior_phase_3: WARN persists; no escalation to ERROR per legacy-immutability principle
lint_integration.auto_fix_path: compute v_metric from existing falsifier_outcomes if all entries have inferable class (default C1_design_validity); otherwise emit a placeholder skeleton and ask author to fill class field per falsifier

backward_compatibility_and_migration.sentinel_format: __V_METRIC_SCORE__ V=<f.3> S=<f.3> C=<f.3> classes=<L> n_pass=<i> n_fail=<i> n_ack=<i>
backward_compatibility_and_migration.federation_contract: joins federation per #33: shares raw 80 sentinel + 0/1/2 exit code convention with sibling lints; auto-discoverable by future tool/lint_all.hexa orchestrator (#32 design)

worked_example_this_witness.interpretation: V=0.84 — strong strength (1.0; all falsifiable verdicts PASS); moderate coverage (0.60; missed C3 scope-boundary as standalone class and C4 adversarial-stress class); design-only cycles often score this shape — strong on validity+evidence+meta, weak on adversarial/scope. Legacy gate also passes (n_pass=4 ≥ majority of 5).
worked_example_this_witness.tier_1_gate_AND_rule: V=0.84 ≥ 0.5 ✓ AND legacy n_pass=4 ≥ majority(5)=3 ✓ → tier_1_gate_overall PASS

irreducible_friction_acknowledgments.irreducibility: structural to kick(ω-cycle) framework — author writes falsifier AND verdict; v-metric inherits this property
irreducible_friction_acknowledgments.consequence: V is a SELF-CONSISTENCY measure, not an absolute quality measure; cross-cycle comparison fragile beyond same-author/same-kind

irreducible_friction_acknowledgments.irreducibility: as new cycle kinds emerge, the 5-class taxonomy will need extension; any fixed denominator (/5) becomes stale
irreducible_friction_acknowledgments.consequence: v_metric.version must bump on taxonomy change; comparison_rule forbids cross-version
irreducible_friction_acknowledgments.mitigation_optional: explicit version field + cross-version comparison rule

irreducible_friction_acknowledgments.irreducibility: what counts as 'adversarial-stress' is author-judgment; lint can warn on suspicious class labeling but cannot enforce honesty
irreducible_friction_acknowledgments.consequence: weighted strength S has author-noise; per #33 rule_id 'unknown-id' precedent applies — warn but never error

anti_temptations_resisted: tempting to recommend O4 dual-channel as primary for the cleanest P6 fix — REJECTED because grader-budget is not allocated and current cycle volume does not justify it; held as deferred future-work

tempting to weight scope-boundary class (C3) at zero to discourage padding — REJECTED because C3 is genuinely informative when scope IS the cycle's contribution (e.g. boundary-discovery cycles); chose w_C3=0.5 to dampen but not erase
tempting to retroactively compute v_metric for all 49 today's witnesses and report a histogram — REJECTED because retroactive class assignment is speculative; author must self-classify forward only

tempting to set tier_1_gate to v_metric ≥ 0.7 (stricter) — REJECTED because that retroactively invalidates many landed witnesses computed under legacy rules; chose ≥0.5 + legacy-AND to preserve continuity
what_this_design_does_NOT_solve: self-grading remains; without O4 dual-channel, V is a self-consistency metric not an absolute quality metric
class-label honesty cannot be enforced by lint — only audited; cargo-cult mislabeling is structurally possible
comparison across cycle KINDS (e.g. design vs build vs measurement) is not meaningful even within v1; this is honest scope, not a deficiency to fix
legacy 49 witnesses keep their flat falsifier_pass_count; they will not be retro-graded

adoption_forecast.method: Beta-distribution-style P10/P50/P90 bands for v_metric field presence on NEW witnesses; anchored on (a) #33 forecast that template-only adoption uplift = 35-70% P50 55%; (b) precedent #29 axis fields adopted at near-100% within hours (template-driven) vs @methodology at 7.1% over 24h (no template); (c) v_metric requires CLASS labels per falsifier so adoption needs both template AND author-effort

no_intervention_7d.rationale: novel field, no template, no lint; only this cycle and its immediate carry-forward

template_only_via_witness_template_emit_.rationale: template defaults v_metric block + per-falsifier class field; matches #33 I1 template-only band

template_plus_lint_warn_14d.rationale: WARN-level v-metric-presence after day 7; matches #33 I2 template+lint(warn) band

template_plus_lint_strict_30d.rationale: v-metric-presence cannot escalate to ERROR per backward-compat policy; ceiling lower than full-strict

no_audit_14d.rationale: default-C1 fallback is structurally honest but not maximally informative; ~40% of falsifiers will keep default even when C2/C4 fits better

with_weekly_conformance_audit_30d.rationale: audit cycle fires occasional WARN-list per #17 mitigation_rule_count=3 precedent

adoption_forecast.skepticism_band_disclosed: P10-P90 bands are wide (≈30 pp) reflecting (a) v_metric is a NEW concept not just a new field — author must understand both class taxonomy and weighted formula; (b) precedent #33 forecast is one-day-old itself, unmeasured; (c) #34 measurement showed 50 witnesses in one day at flat-count v-metric — if v1 introduces friction, daily volume might drop short-term and recover at day 7-14
adoption_forecast.honest_no_overclaim: Realistic 30-day P50: v_metric field present on 75% of new witnesses; class labels correct on 70% of those; effective HONEST v-metric coverage = 75% × 70% ≈ 52% of new witnesses. NONE of these reach 80% canonical-adoption-rate within 30 days. 80% threshold plausible at 60-90 days conditional on tool/lint_all.hexa orchestrator existing AND a 2nd-cycle conformance audit landing.

carry_forward.deliverable: extend tool/witness_template_emit.hexa (proposed #33 I1) to emit v_metric block + per-falsifier class field; selftest emits all 5 class examples
extend tool/witness_schema_lint.hexa (proposed #33 I2) with rule_id 'v-metric-presence' INFO/WARN; auto-fix path computes v_metric from existing falsifier_outcomes with default-C1
EDIT state/omega_cycle_methodology_spec_2026-04-27.md adding v-metric v1 spec section + 5-class taxonomy + weighted formula + worked example
scan all witnesses landed since 2026-04-27; report v_metric presence rate, class-label distribution, V histogram; validate forecast bands
feasibility study of O4 dual-channel external-replay; sub-agent budget estimate; if grader-budget approved, BUILD cycle to follow
weekly conformance audit per #17; sample 10 new witnesses; spot-check class labels against falsifier text; emit warn-list (no retro edit)
watch for cycle kinds whose falsifiers don't fit C1..C5; if 3+ examples surface, propose v_metric.version=v2 with extended taxonomy

raw_compliance.raw_8_hexa_only: PASS — design-only; no .py/.sh/.rs/.toml; this .json witness only; no tool/*.hexa modifications
raw_compliance.raw_47_witness_landed: this witness lands at /Users/ghost/core/nexus/design/kick/2026-04-27_v-metric-redesign_omega_cycle.json (matches declared landing path with double-slash normalized to single)
raw_compliance.raw_80_sentinel_format: see sentinel block; new __V_METRIC_SCORE__ format declared

atlas_protection.evidence: READ-ONLY: only this witness JSON emitted; no tool/*.hexa modifications; no atlas shard edits other than auto-ingest path

sentinels.v_metric_score_self: __V_METRIC_SCORE__ V=0.840 S=1.000 C=0.600 classes=3 n_pass=4 n_fail=0 n_ack=1
sentinels.v_metric_design: __V_METRIC_DESIGN__ PASS options=4 chosen=O3 taxonomy_classes=5 alpha=0.6 forecast_p50_30d=75pct

headline: v-metric (verification metric for Tier-1 gate) redesigned from unweighted PASS-count to V = 0.6·S + 0.4·C ∈ [0,1] where S = class-weighted PASS-rate over PASS+FAIL only, C = distinct falsifier-classes covered / 5. 5-class taxonomy {design-validity, evidence-grounding, scope-boundary, adversarial-stress, meta-honesty} with weights {1.0, 1.5, 0.5, 2.0, 1.0}. 4 design options enumerated; O3 composite recommended primary, O4 dual-channel replay-grader DEFERRED. Backward-compatible: legacy falsifier_pass_count + tier_1_count fields kept verbatim; v_metric is OPTIONAL new top-level field; lint behavior INFO→WARN over 14d, never ERROR. 3 irreducible-friction ACKNOWLEDGED (self-grading, taxonomy drift, calibration noise). Federation joins #33 I2 witness_schema_lint with new sentinel __V_METRIC_SCORE__. Worked example: this witness scores V=0.840 (S=1.0, C=0.6). 30d P50 forecast: 75% field-presence × 70% class-label-correctness ≈ 52% honest-coverage; 80% canonical threshold not reachable within 30d — explicit no-overclaim.
